summary: Juicy‑sounding soundboard capture of a solid ’89 show highlighted by a smoking Scarlet>Fire, an inspired Playin Reprise and strong Brent & Phil jams.
review: The recording is a clean SBD with full‑bodied mix that lets the band’s tight playing shine.  The concert delivers several standouts – a driving Scarlet>Fire, a beautifully executed Playin Reprise and memorable Bird Song and Other One jams – while the Built‑to‑Last segment feels a bit flat.  Overall the performance is strong, though Jerry’s voice shows some wear and a few mix quirks (high Phil bass, Bob’s guitar) are noted.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers give 4‑star ratings and praise both the musical set and the SBD sound; only one mixed 3‑star review tempers the average, yielding an overall strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Juicy, full‑bodied SBD with crisp clarity; minor mix idiosyncrasies noted (Phil’s bass forward, Bob’s guitar a touch high).

show_quality.setlist_flow: Unusual but seamless transitions (Playin > Built, PITB > Built) add intrigue; the second set builds momentum despite a slightly flat Built segment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Voice shows some strain yet his harmonizing and lead work are praised; occasional lack of power noted in later set.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass sits high in the mix (which many like) and he shines during jams, especially with Brent.
band_member_comments.Bob: Guitar occasionally rides a bit high in the mix but overall contributes solid rhythm work.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboards) is highlighted as being in top form, delivering haunting ballads and strong interplay with Phil.
band_member_comments.Drums: Percussion praised for its nuanced, prodding feel; drums are solid throughout.
